seo.title: Virtual Human Sings – AI Singing Video Generator with Lip Sync | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create AI singing videos with realistic lip sync. Transform any portrait into a virtual singer performing in a professional recording studio—perfect for music content creators and social media.

hero.title: Virtual Human Sings
hero.description: Create AI singing videos with realistic lip sync. Upload a portrait photo and audio clips—the AI transforms your image into a virtual singer performing in a professional recording studio, with perfectly synchronized lip movements. Perfect for music creators who want engaging video content without filming.

steps.title: Upload portrait photo and describe the scene
steps.description: Provide a portrait image and describe how you want the virtual singer to appear—like wearing a hat, headphones, standing before a microphone in a recording studio with soft lighting.

steps.title: AI generates recording studio scenes
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates multiple professional recording studio scenes with your character, maintaining identity consistency while adding cinematic atmosphere and realistic lighting.

steps.title: Upload audio segments for lip sync
steps.description: Provide 3 audio clips of the song. Each clip will be paired with a different camera angle of your virtual singer for visual variety in the final video.

steps.title: Generate lip-synced singing videos
steps.description: Fal Infinitalk creates realistic lip sync videos for each scene, then the built-in video editor combines them into a complete music video with multiple camera angles.

whoIsFor.title: Built for music creators and content producers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From independent musicians to social media creators, see who makes singing videos with AI.

audiences.label: Independent musicians
audiences.description: Create professional music video content for your songs without expensive video production, using your own image or a virtual persona.

audiences.label: Social media content creators
audiences.description: Produce engaging singing and lip sync videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts that stand out with studio-quality visuals.

audiences.label: Virtual influencer creators
audiences.description: Build and animate virtual personas that can perform music content, expanding your creative possibilities beyond static images.

audiences.label: Music marketers
audiences.description: Generate promotional singing videos for artist campaigns, cover songs, or brand jingles with consistent virtual performer representations.

items.question: What is the Virtual Human Sings workflow?
items.answer: This AI-powered workflow creates realistic singing videos with lip sync. It transforms your portrait into a virtual singer in a recording studio, syncs lip movements to your audio, and combines multiple camera angles into a complete music video.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for generating consistent character images in different poses, and Fal Infinitalk for realistic audio-to-video lip sync generation. A built-in video editor assembles the final multi-angle video.

items.question: What inputs do I need to provide?
items.answer: You need a portrait photo of the person (or character) you want as the singer, and 3 audio clips of the song segments. The AI handles scene generation and lip sync automatically.

items.question: How realistic is the lip sync?
items.answer: Fal Infinitalk produces highly realistic lip sync that matches the audio timing and phonetics. The result looks natural with proper mouth movements synchronized to the singing.

items.question: Can I use any portrait photo?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow works with any clear portrait photo—real people, illustrated characters, or AI-generated faces. The AI maintains identity consistency across all generated scenes.

items.question: What does the final video look like?
items.answer: The output is a professional-looking music video featuring your virtual singer in a recording studio setting, with multiple camera angles (front view, side angles) edited together with smooth transitions.

items.question: Can I customize the recording studio scene?
items.answer: Yes. You can describe the desired scene elements—lighting style, accessories like hats or headphones, microphone setup, and overall atmosphere to match your creative vision.

items.question: How does pricing work for this workflow?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used. The workflow combines Nano Banana Pro (50% discount) for image generation and Fal Infinitalk for lip sync video creation.
